china_crude.pipelineNote: Includes ESPO (Russia→China) (~600 kbd) via Russian Federation since 2024-01-01; Kazakhstan-China (~220 kbd) via Kazakhstan since 2024-01-01; Myanmar-China (~200 kbd) via Myanmar since 2024-01-01

iraq_crude.pipelineNote: Includes Kirkuk-Ceyhan (Iraq→Turkey) (~250 kbd) via Turkey since 2026-03-17

russia_crude.pipelineNote: Includes ESPO export (Russia→China) (~600 kbd) via China since 2024-01-01

saudi_arabia_crude.pipelineNote: Includes Saudi East-West + SUMED bypass (~1500 kbd) via Egypt since 2026-03-11
